data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of waitlisting for sold-out group events.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where customers are notified about available spots in a sold-out event. However, the evidence does not confirm that notifications were sent to waitlisters, nor does it demonstrate the implementation of the first tap wins mechanism, which is critical for this scenario. The linked use case outlines the requirements but lacks concrete evidence of their fulfillment, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of notifications being sent to waitlisters.
No evidence of the first tap winning mechanism being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for notification delivery
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the notification delivery to waitlisters.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for race condition handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the first tap wins mechanism.
